message:
fix(concurrency): restore Phase 5 auto-flush and fix backoff cap

Two bugs found in fresh-eyes review of the #243 fix:

1. storage_result.take() for Create broke Phase 5 auto-flush — the JSONL
   file would never get updated after br create. Reverted to the original
   execute() call; the .write.lock serialization makes the double-open safe.

2. blocking_write_lock applied .min(800ms) before .mul_f32(1.5), causing
   the delay to oscillate between 800ms and 1200ms instead of capping at
   800ms. Fixed ordering to multiply-then-cap.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
